name: Dry Jerk Seasoning
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons dried chives or green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a tightly sealed glass jar.
3. Store the seasoning for up to one month.
4. Use this spice blend frequently, as it enhances the flavor of salad dressings, slaw, and any dishes featuring meat, fish, or poultry.
